payload.answer: Compiled durable architecture decisions and preserved unresolved items as open questions.
citations: For context, # Chat Summary: Brain Architecture
Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Open questions: Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?
payload.decision: Commit durable architecture decisions and preserve unresolved questions as open questions.

entity_resolution.reason: The input names architecture components and decisions but provides no stable existing entity IDs to resolve against.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the personal memory system.
Cognee should be treated as a rebuildable semantic projection, not the source of truth.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent.
It remains unresolved whether Telegram should be added later.
It remains unresolved which model is cheapest while still saturating performance.

details: Committed Brain DB as the source of truth.
Committed Cognee as a rebuildable semantic projection.
Committed Slack as a strict memory intake agent.
Preserved Telegram integration and model cost/performance selection as unresolved questions.
